html:
“When equipped, allows Wendy to drink Elixirs herself.”

-

The Wraith's Wreath is an item exclusive to Don't Starve Together that can only be crafted by Wendy with the Mourning Glory II skill. When wearing the Wraith's Wreath, it allows Wendy to drink Wendy's Ghostly Elixirs (except Super Elixirs) by hovering the Elixir onto the Wraith's Wreath and right clicking, gaining a weaker or similar effect. If you unequip it, the effect instantly disappears. Ghosts will be neutral to players equipped with a Wraith's Wreath, but they will still follow them. Ghosts will also become neutral if you were attacked by them, but the player put on a Wraith's Wreath and didn't attack back.

Icon Name Recipe To Abigail To Player Character
Effect Duration Effect Duration
Revenant Restorative x1 x1 +2/s 1 day/8 minutes +1/s 20 seconds
Spectral Cure-All x3 x1 +20/s 30 seconds +5/s 20 seconds
Unyielding Draught x1 x1 Doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 second
(the shield absorbs all damage after the initial attack) 		1 day/8 minutes Gain a 50 shield that absorbs incoming damage.
After being hit, it applies a 10-second cooldown. This effect stacks with armor protection. 		2 minutes
Distilled Vengeance x3 x1 Doubles the duration of Abigail's protective shield from 0.5 to 1 seconds
In addition to absorbing damage, all Mobs attacking a shield take 20 damage. 		1 day/8 minutes Gain a 50 shield that absorbs incoming damage.
After being hit, it applies a 10-second cooldown. This effect stacks with armor protection and deals 20 damage to surrounding mobs when hit. 		2 minutes
Nightshade Nostrum x3 x1 Makes Abigail's attacks deal nighttime damage (40) regardless of the time of the day 1 day/8 minutes Night vision. 6 minutes
Vigor Mortis x1 x1 Increases Abigail's movement speed by 75% 1 day/8 minutes Offset up to 25% of slowdown from carrying heavy objects.
Won't get slowed down by Sticky Webbing and Honey Trail. 		1 day/8 minutes
Ghastly Experience x1 x3
(need ) 		Upgrade Abigail to Level 3 immediately. 2 minutes +5 and +12.5 immediately.
Remove 25% of Max Health Penalty immediately. 		0.3 seconds
Cursed Vexation x1 x3
(need ) 		Super Elixir, can be used with regular Elixir at the same time.
When Abigail inflicted the vex, Wendy's attacks deal +10 Planar Damage to foes. 		1 day/8 minutes Can't Drink
Luminous Wrath x1 x3
(need ) 		Super Elixir, can be used with regular Elixir at the same time.
Abigail's attack deal extra 10 Planar Damage.
100 Planar Damage when she is Gestalt 		2 minutes

If you unequip it, the effect instantly disappears.
Ghosts will be neutral to players equipped with a Wraith's Wreath, but they will still follow them. Ghosts will also become neutral if you were attacked by them, but the player put on a Wraith's Wreath and didn't attack back.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Vòng hoa Wraith là một vật phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together và chỉ có thể được chế tạo bởi Wendy với kỹ năng Mourning Glory II. Khi đeo Wraith's Wreath, nó cho phép Wendy uống Wendy's Ghostly Elixirs (trừ Super Elixir) bằng cách đưa Elixir lên Wraith's Wreath và nhấp chuột phải, đạt được hiệu ứng yếu hơn hoặc tương tự. Nếu bạn tháo nó ra, hiệu ứng sẽ biến mất ngay lập tức. Bóng ma sẽ trung lập với những người chơi được trang bị Wraith's Wreath, nhưng chúng vẫn sẽ đi theo chúng. Bóng ma cũng sẽ trở nên trung lập nếu bạn bị chúng tấn công, nhưng người chơi đeo Vòng hoa của Wraith…

{{Scrapbook Info|When equipped, allows Wendy to drink Elixirs herself.}}
The '''Wraith's Wreath''' is an item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' that can only be crafted by [[Wendy/Don't Starve Together|Wendy]] with the [[Mourning Glory II]] skill. When wearing the Wraith's Wreath, it allows Wendy to drink Wendy's [[Ghostly Elixir]]s (except Super Elixirs) by hovering the Elixir onto the Wraith's Wreath and right clicking, gaining a weaker or similar effect. If you unequip it, the effect instantly disappears.
[[Ghost]]s will be neutral to players equipped with a Wraith's Wreath, but they will still follow them. Ghosts will also become neutral if you were attacked by them, but the player put on a Wraith's Wreath and didn't attack back.
